day2_night_start.name: Me
day2_night_start.text: *Home. I check my phone again. The old school group chat... I'm the only one left. Everyone else left the chat.*

day2_night_2.name: Me
day2_night_2.text: *I tried calling my old homeroom teacher. 'The number you have dialed is no longer in service.' ...What?*

day2_night_3.name: Me
day2_night_3.text: *Did they change numbers? I tried calling other friends too, but none of them pick up or the numbers are disconnected.*

day2_night_4.name: Me
day2_night_4.text: *...This is strange. There's no way everyone is unreachable like this.*

day2_night_phone_sea_2.name: Me
day2_night_phone_sea_2.text:
*Sea: 'Thanks for today. Let's eat together again tomorrow!'*
*Sea: '...I like being with you, {name}.'*

day2_night_phone_sea_3.name: Me
day2_night_phone_sea_3.text: *...That second message hits differently. Is she just being friendly, or...*

day2_night_5.name: Me
day2_night_5.text: *I should ask Ms. Eunsu tomorrow. Why all the contacts from my old school are cut off. For now, let's just sleep.*

day2_night_dream_2.name: Me
day2_night_dream_2.text: *I'm walking down a dark hallway. This is... the school? The school corridor at night. Only my footsteps echo.*

day2_night_dream_4.name: Me
day2_night_dream_4.text: *I turned around. No one there. But I definitely heard it. A girl's voice.*

day2_night_dream_5.name: Me
day2_night_dream_5.text: *Someone is standing at the end of the corridor. A pale face, eyes gazing into the distance. ...The girl from the back row?*

day2_night_dream_6.name: Me
day2_night_dream_6.text: *The moment I try to step closer, the floor gives way and everything goes dark.*

day2_night_wake.name: Me
day2_night_wake.text: *...! I jolt awake, drenched in sweat. It was a dream. Just a dream. ...Right?*
